title: Item Counter Mod
description: Shows the amount of items you have on screen
body: # Item Counter ## Features - Customizable items order - Toggleable metadata check - Horizontal / Vertical mode ## How to use - Hold the item you want to add and do ``/itemcounter add`` - In config page, you can move the item objects to adjust the order of it ## Screenshots HUD ![HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1nktqmwn/images/9eec437dc1f827c3d255848ca78086ff205c0dbc.png) Config Menu ![Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1nktqmwn/images/c9c69aa74c5f48810026dd0e3d75de609cd1d678.png)
